reviews.name: 후추
reviews.content:
🧡냥사원 솔직리뷰🧡
안녕하세요! 방구석 헌터 후추에요! 저는 누나랑 매일 저녁 사냥 놀이 한 바탕 무조건!! 해줘야 밤에 가족들을 조용히 재워줘요😎 그리고 매일매일 새로운 장난감이어야 해요! 똑같은 놈들은 시시하거든요.... 😼 요번에 누나가 모양이 다~~ 다른 사냥감들을 가져왔더라고요?!  어제는 롱테일로 놀고, 오늘은 스네이크랑 놀고 내일은 트윙클이랑 놀거에요! 그리고 진짜 꿀팁! 제가 제~~일 좋아하는 히끄네 우도땅콩 장난감을 걸어서 놀면 엄청 재미져요😻

그나저나 누나가 요 사냥감들 온 후로는 팔도 안 아프게 침대에 누워서 대~충~대~충 놀아주는 건 기분탓이겠죠...? 편한거 절대 못참아... 하여튼간에 전국의 방구석 헌터 친구들도 플레이 롱 낚싯대로 멋진 실력을 뽐내보자구요!!
reviews.content_en:
🧡Cat Employee Honest Review🧡
Hello! I'm Pepper, the couch hunter! I absolutely HAVE to play hunting games with my sister every evening - it's the only way to get the family to sleep quietly at night 😎 And I need new toys every single day! The same old ones are boring... 😼 This time my sister brought me hunting toys with completely different shapes?! Yesterday I played with the Long Tail, today with the Snake, and tomorrow I'm playing with the Twinkle! And here's a real pro tip - when my sister uses my FAVORITE Kick Me Udo Peanut toy on a rod, it's SO much fun 😻

By the way, ever since these hunting toys arrived, my sister just lies in bed and plays with me half-heartedly without moving her arms... that's probably just my imagination, right...? I can never resist being comfortable... Anyway, all my couch hunter friends around the country, let's show off our amazing skills with the Play Long fishing rod!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
옴청 좋아하네요 ㅎ
큰집으로 이사가야 겠어요 ㅎ
reviews.content_en: I really love this 😊 I think I need to move to a bigger house 😊

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
저희집 고양이가 놀아줘도 되게 금방 흥미를 잃는 편인데 며칠이 지난 오늘도 잘 갖고 놀고 있어서 좋아요

깃털 잡으려고 펄쩍 펄쩍 점프도 하고 그랬는데 그 영상은 못 찍었네용 ㅎㅎㅎ 

아! 일단 제품 포장이 너무 깔끔하고 통이 튼튼해서 보관이 용이합니다 낚시대가 3단이라 접었다 폈다 할 수 있는 것도 큰 장점이에요 ㅎㅎㅎ 기존에 쓰던 긴 깃털 장난감들은 다 놀고 정리하기가 곤란했는데 이 제품은 깔끔하게 착! 정리할 수 있어서 좋아요 고양이가 저 없는 사이에 깃털을 물어뜯을까 하는 걱정도 안해도 되구요.. 

제품 퀄리티나 마감도 가격대비 만족합니다. 싸구려 플라스틱보다 튼튼하고 뭔가 깔끔한 느낌?
고양이가 좋아해요~~ 후기 끗!
reviews.content_en: My cat usually loses interest quickly even when we play, but it's nice to see her still playing with this even after a few days have passed. She's been jumping around trying to catch the feathers, though I didn't get a video of that haha. Oh, the packaging is really neat and the container is sturdy, so it's easy to store! The fact that the fishing rod is 3-segmented so you can fold and unfold it is a big plus too haha. The long feather toys I used before were so hard to play with and put away, but this product is easy to organize cleanly! And I don't have to worry about my cat chewing on the feathers when I'm gone... The product quality and finish are satisfying for the price. It feels more sturdy than cheap plastic, kind of polished? My cat loves it~~ That's my review!

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content:
최애장남감을 만나버림 !!!
다른 장난감들은 시큰둥했었는데 요 낚싯대 들기만하면 어딘가에서 튀어나와요 ㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en:
I found my ultimate favorite toy!!!
Other toys were meh, but the moment I pick up this fishing rod, she jumps out from somewhere hahaha

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 낚시대로 잘 노는데 여러개 부러져가지고 ㅠㅠ 튼튼해보여서 샀어요! 깃털 추가하는거 종류 많은거 생각하면 가격이 진짜 저렴하고 좋네요 🥳 저희 애기는 평소에 리필 호불호가 좀 갈리는데 다행히 여기 들어있는건 다 잘 가지고 놀아요~~ 길이가 긴 것도 진짜 편하네요~~ ㅎ리필팩 다른 것도 많이 나왔음 좋겠어요~~
reviews.content_en: She plays well with the fishing rod, but several of mine broke ㅠㅠ I bought this because it looked sturdy! Considering how many feather refill options there are, the price is really cheap and great 🥳 My baby is usually picky about refills, but thankfully she plays with all of these well~~ The long length is really convenient too~~ I hope more refill pack varieties come out soon~~

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content: 이거아주물건인데요.우리애기를 날라다니게만드네요!끊임없이놀아달리고 들러붙는데 힘들어죽을맛이네요!
reviews.content_en: This is seriously quality stuff. It just makes our baby run around constantly! She won't stop asking to play and keeps clinging to me - it's exhaustingly fun!

reviews.name: 예****
reviews.content:
선물용으로 샀는데, 롱 낚싯대라서 멀리서도 편하게 놀아줄 수 있어요
리필팩까지 사서 넘나 다양한 깃털에 고양이 친구가 아주 좋아했습니당
reviews.content_en: I bought this as a gift, and since it's a long fishing rod, it's convenient to play with her from a distance. I even bought refill packs and my cat friend absolutely loved all the different feather options!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content:
제주이사오고
길냥이가 밥먹으러 옵니다
많이친해져서. 놀잇감으로 고민하다가. 선택했어요
탄력도 굿. 반응도 굿!!!👍👍👍
reviews.content_en: We moved to Jeju and a stray cat comes by for food. After getting closer with her, I was thinking about what toy to get, so I chose this. The elasticity is great. The response is great too!!! 👍👍👍

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 사자마자 집에있던 부러진 낚시대, 대충 엮어만든 장난감 다 갖다 버렸어요. 이거 말고는 눈길도 안줘요ㅠㅠ 그립감도 너무 편하고 오래 놀아주다보면 무게때문에 손목에 무리가 가기도하는데 가벼워서 그런거 전혀 없었어요. 약간 팅팅 튕기는 낚싯대의 탄력감과 쫀쫀한 낚싯줄도 너무 좋아요. 진짜 낚시하는 기분이에요! 하나 아쉬운게있다면 회전 깃털 여분만 5개씩 묶음으로 판매해주면 좋을거같아요~ 날아가는 모습이 생동감이 넘쳐서 그런가 움직이다 멈춘 장난감에만 달려드는 둘째가 우다다 쫒아가면서 잡으려고 손을 막 뻗는데 운동 잘시켜준거 같아서 너무 사길 잘 했다고 생각했어요. 깃털 특성상 잘 빠지는거 알고 있기때문에 여분을 더 사고싶은데 회전깃털만은 따로 판매를 하지 않는거 같더라구요ㅠㅠㅠ 일단 낚싯대 2개 더 구매 할 예정이니까 한동안 그걸로 버텨보겠습니다..! 좋은 제품 만들어 주신 바잇미 관계자분들 정말 감사합니다!!
reviews.content_en: As soon as I got it, I threw away all the broken fishing rods and poorly made toys I had at home. She won't even look at anything else ㅠㅠ The grip feels so comfortable, and when playing for long periods, normally the wrist gets tired from the weight, but this is so light there's no strain at all. I love the springy elasticity of the fishing rod and the chewy texture of the line - it literally feels like real fishing! One thing I wish for is if they sold just the rotating feather refills in bundles of 5 each. The lifelike flying motion is so dynamic that even my second cat, who usually only pounces on stationary toys, is chasing and reaching out trying to catch it - it's such good exercise. I'm so glad I bought it! I know feathers naturally fall off, so I want to buy more refills, but it seems they don't sell just the rotating feathers separately ㅠㅠㅠ I'm planning to buy 2 more fishing rods to get through for a while! Thank you so much to the BITE ME staff for making such a great product!!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
데빌스네이크만 좋아하는 팡인인데 깃털에도 반응이 좋네용
그리구 낚시대가 미적으로나 쓸모로써 퀄리티도 넘 조아요옹👍
절대 저렴하게 느껴지는 상품들이 아닌데 가성비가 넘놈 좋게 느껴져요 …!
reviews.content_en: I'm a big fan of Devil Snake, but she's also responding well to the feathers! And the fishing rod looks great aesthetically and the quality is amazing functionally 👍 It doesn't feel cheap at all, and the value for the price is incredibly good...!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 내구성이 썩 좋진 않지만 긴 낚시대 있으니 놀아주기도 편하고 아이도 더 좋아하는 듯 해요
reviews.content_en: The durability isn't great, but having a long fishing rod makes it easier to play and my kid seems to like it more

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
설렁설렁 놀아줘두 길어서 움직임이 크니깐
놀아주기 너무 편해요~~~
종류도 다양해서 냥이들 질리지않고 
아주 잘 사용할것 같아요!
reviews.content_en: Even when I play a little lazily, it's so long that the movement is big, so it's super easy to play with~~~ There are lots of varieties so my cats don't get bored, and I think we'll use it really well!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 정말 오랜만에 저희 고양이 장난감을 샀어요! 일반 줄에달린 장난감은 많았는데 낚시대형은 오래전에 고장난이후로 안샀었거든요. 오늘 바로 오자마자 놀아주니 너무 행복해하는 고양이모습에 제가 더 행복하네오^^
reviews.content_en: It's been such a long time since I bought a toy for my cat! I had lots of regular string toys, but haven't bought a fishing rod type since the old one broke ages ago. As soon as it arrived today and I played with her, my cat looked so happy that I became even happier ^^

reviews.name: i****
reviews.content:
길냥이이신 마당냥이들을 모시고 사는 집사예요
나름 길냥이라 간식 줄때 외에는 가까이가거나 터치는 안돼요
아들냥이는 수시로 마실다니는데 엄마냥이 다리에 장애가 있어 화단 아래를 못내려가요
평생 화단만 보고 살 엄마냥이를 위해 낚시대를 사보았어요
이걸로 놀아주면 좋지 않을까
캣피싱사려다 캣피싱보다 긴것같아서 엄마냥이가 더 안정감을 느낄거같아서 샀네요
부디 좋아하셨으면ㅜㅜ
reviews.content_en: I'm a caretaker for outdoor cats - a mama and her son who live in the yard. As a street cat, the mama cat doesn't let us touch her except when giving treats. The son comes by often, but the mama cat has a disability in her leg so she can't go down from the flowerbed. For our mama cat who's only ever known the flowerbed, I decided to buy a fishing rod. I thought playing with this might be nice. I was going to get Cat Fishing, but this seemed longer, so I figured mama cat would feel more secure with this. I really hope she likes it ㅜㅜ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 우와 고급지고 정말  길어서 편하네요
reviews.content_en: Wow, it's really upscale and so long - very convenient!

reviews.name: 류****
reviews.content: 구성품도 넘 좋고 이쁘고 튼튼해요👍🏻
reviews.content_en: The contents are great and it's pretty and sturdy 👍🏻

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 냥이 전용이지만 저희 강아지는 냥장난감에 환장해서 구매했습니다 길이가 길어서 놀아주기 편하네요
reviews.content_en: It's supposed to be just for cats, but our dog is obsessed with cat toys, so we bought this. The length makes it easy to play with her

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
낚시대가 부러져서 급하게 구매했는데 튼튼하고 좋아요
마음에 들어요
reviews.content_en: My fishing rod broke so I bought this urgently and it's sturdy and nice. I love it

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 생각보다 완전 길어요ㅎㅎ 그래서 조금만 꺼내서 쓸 때도 있어요. 그래도 원목이라 다른것 보다는 튼튼한 것 같습니다
reviews.content_en: It's way longer than I thought haha So sometimes I only use part of it. But since it's natural wood, it seems more durable than other options

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
길고 좋았는데 너무 약해요
뜯은지 5분도 안되서 깃털 2개가 빠지고 방울도 빠지고 맨위에 있는 첫번째 낚시대는 잘 들어가지도 않고 그렇다고 너무 세게하면 부러질까봐 세게 넣지도 못하고...이럴거면 그냥 다×소에서 사는게 훨씬 가성비가 좋은거같아요...
reviews.content_en: It was long and nice, but it's too fragile. Less than 5 minutes after opening it, 2 feathers fell off and the bell came off too, and the first rod segment at the top doesn't fit in well. I don't want to push too hard or it might break... If this is the case, it's way better value to just buy from another store...

reviews.name: 채****
reviews.content: 길어서좋아요^^ 단 낚싯줄은 짧.. 생각보다 안무겁구요
reviews.content_en: It's long which is nice ^^ But the line could be longer. It's also lighter than expected

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
기본 깃털제품은 거짓 1도 없이 냥이가 한번 건드니 깃털이 하나씩 빠져서 총두번 건드리자 총두개가 다 빠져 깃털 하나만 남았어요. 
리필팩 추가로 하나더 같이 구매하긴했지만~ 바잇미 제작이라 기대를 한만큼 너무 쉽게 떨어져서 실망하긴했어요~ 그래도 다른 아이템들은 괜찮길 바라면서 열심히 사용해볼께요~~ 어쩌다 약한제품이 저한테 온거 같긴해서 아쉽지만 그냥 나머지 잘 사용해보것슴다~
reviews.content_en: The basic feather product is 100% honest - my cat touched it once and one feather fell off, and after touching it twice, both fell off leaving just one feather. I did buy an additional refill pack separately, but since it's a BITE ME product I had high expectations, and I was disappointed that they fell off so easily. Still hoping the other items hold up better... I'll use them carefully. I'm sorry that this weak product ended up with me, but I'll just keep using the rest well~~

reviews.name: 고****
reviews.content: 길어서 좋네요 줄도 길었으면 다 좋았을꺼같아요
reviews.content_en: It's nice because it's long. I think it would be perfect if the string was longer too

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
이제껏 수많은 낚싯대와 장난감에  많은 돈을 썼었는데
이 낚싯대 접하니 이제 찾았다싶네요
조금 무거운감이 있지만 적응되면 괜찮고
무엇보다 까다로운 애옹이가 날아다녀요
reviews.content_en: I've spent so much money on countless fishing rods and toys over the years, and now that I've found this one, I feel like I've found "the one." It's a bit heavy, but you adjust to it, and most importantly, my picky little kitty goes flying around

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content: 애기들이 엄청 좋아하는데 하루만에 부러졌어요ㅠ 싼 가격은 아닌 거 같은데 생각보다 너무 약하네요.. 깃털도 1분도 안 돼서 다 빠져버렸어요.. 리필팩으로 구매했는데 너무 많이 남아서 낚싯대만 다시 구매해야할 거 같네요ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: The babies absolutely love it but it broke after just one day ㅠ It doesn't seem like a cheap price but it's weaker than expected... The feathers fell off in less than a minute too.. I bought the refill pack but there are so many left over that I think I'll have to buy just the rod again ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 같이 딸려오는 리필 장난감까지 반응 장난 아닙니다 대신 하루만에 낚시대가 다 박살이 났어요.. 손잡이 날라감..ㅋㅋ 애기 이빨로 아작 날 수 있는 소잽니다.. 다시 살게요…
reviews.content_en: The refill toys that come with it get amazing reactions, but the fishing rod completely broke after just one day.. The handle flew off..ㅋㅋ It's something that can break from baby teeth.. I'll be buying another one…

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 친구집 냥이들 선물로 해줬어요 우리냥이도 사줘야겠어요 길어서 사람은 안움직여도 되겠어요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I gave it as a gift to my friend's cats. I need to get one for my cat too. It's so long that I don't have to move at all haha

reviews.name: 옥****
reviews.content: 길고 나름 튼튼한서 같아서 좋아요. 리필팩도 여러가지 들어있는데 한번씩 바꿔줘야겟어요
reviews.content_en: It's long and seems pretty sturdy, so I like it. There are several refill packs so I'll need to swap them out sometimes

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 아가가 좋아합니다  또 사러올게요
reviews.content_en: Baby loves it. I'll be back to buy more

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 튼튼하고 좋네요 잘 쓸께요
reviews.content_en: It's sturdy and nice. I'll use it well

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content: 반응도 격렬하고 잘 놀아요. 리필팩도 같이 샀으니 가끔식 갈아 끼워서 놀아주려구요.ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My cat has a really strong reaction to it and plays with it a lot! 😄 I bought refill packs too, so I'm planning to swap them out occasionally to keep playtime fresh.

reviews.name: j****
reviews.content: 길어서 너무 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: It's so long, I love it!

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 너무길어서 작은집에선 못쓰겠어요 20평인데... 그래서 중간을 테이프로 말았어요 묵직하고 좋긴해요
reviews.content_en: It's way too long for my small apartment (about 600 sq ft)... So I rolled up the middle part with tape. It's heavy and nice, but the length was the issue.

reviews.name: 배****
reviews.content: 롱 낚싯대 구매 해보고 싶었어요 약간 불편하지만 뭐 달지 않아도 놀긴하네요 끝 쪽에 마감이 잘 안되어 있어서 살짝 별로 였지만 그냥 사용하려구요
reviews.content_en: I wanted to try out a long fishing rod toy, and it's a bit inconvenient but my cat plays with it even without treats attached. The finish on the end isn't great though, which was a slight letdown, but I'll just use it as is.

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content: 엄청 길어요 그래서 조금 무겁긴합니다 낚싯대가 한마디정도 줄어들고 낚싯줄이 조금 더 길었어도 좋았을것 같긴 합니다 구성은 좋아요~
reviews.content_en: It's incredibly long, so it is a bit heavy. The rod could've been a bit shorter and the string a bit longer, I think. But the overall package is great~

reviews.name: K****
reviews.content:
리필랙이 다양하고 알차요
방에서 쓰기엔 좀 길어서 리필깃털 짧은 낚시대에 나눠쓰니 좋네요
reviews.content_en: The refill packs are diverse and really good value. Since it's a bit long for using in a room, I split the refill feathers between this and a shorter fishing rod toy, and it works great!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 낚시대 넘 좋아하고 물고 뜯고 난리라 리필팩만 따로 저렴하게 구매했어요. 날아다닙니다.
reviews.content_en: My cat absolutely loves this fishing rod and goes crazy with it—biting and tearing at it like crazy! I ended up buying refill packs separately at a good price. The feathers fly everywhere! 😄

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 산 당일 낚싯줄이 끊어져서ㅠㅠ 자체수리해서 장난감도 다른 거 달고 아주 잘 쓰고 있습니다!!!! 내구성은 아쉽지만 나머지는 모두 좋아요~
reviews.content_en: The string snapped on the day I bought it 😭 I fixed it myself and swapped in a different toy attachment, and now it works great!!!! The durability is a bit disappointing, but everything else is perfect~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
울집 애기는 반응을 잘 해주지는 않아요...
아직 낚시대를 많이 사용해보지 않아서 얘가 사냥놀이를 별로 안좋아하는건지 이 낚시대에 흥미가 없는건지 잘 모르겠어요

길이 조절이 안되는 부분은 좀 불편하긴 합니다
reviews.content_en: My cat doesn't react very well to it... Since I haven't used the fishing rod much yet, I'm not sure if my cat just doesn't like hunting play or if they're just not interested in this particular toy. The inability to adjust the length is a bit inconvenient.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 오늘도 사용완료 환장합니다ㅋㅋㅋ근데 긴만큼 충분한 공간확보가 필요해여
reviews.content_en: Used it again today and my cat goes crazy for it! 😂 But you definitely need enough space since it's so long.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 기대한 상품이었는대 부러져서 왔습니다.
reviews.content_en: I was really looking forward to this product, but it arrived broken.

reviews.name: d****
reviews.content:
소심한 우리애는 좀 무서워하는듯요..
좀 편하게 놀아주려고 샀는데 ..  적응시켜야징!
reviews.content_en: My shy cat seems a bit scared of it... I bought it to play more comfortably with them, but I'll need to help them get used to it!

reviews.name: 우****
reviews.content:
저희집 고양이들은 작은 장난감을 좋아하는데
이건 진짜 크네욬ㅋㅋ 처음 꺼냈을 때만 조금 가지고 놀고 다음부턴 팽.. 
뭔가 낚시대 컨트롤이 조금 버거워요
reviews.content_en: My cats prefer smaller toys, and this one is seriously huge lol 😂 They only played with it a little when I first took it out, then lost interest... It also feels a bit difficult to control the fishing rod.

reviews.name: 현****
reviews.content:
길이가 얼마나 긴지 ㅋㅋㅋ
편하고 좋네요 ㅋㅋ 
깃털도 큼직해서 더 맘에들어요
reviews.content_en: The length is crazy long lol 😂 But it's comfortable and great! 😂 I also like the bigger feathers a lot more.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 완전 맘에 들어요. 롱낚싯대 추가구매해야겠어요. 울애기가 날아다녀요 ㅎㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I absolutely love it! I'm thinking of buying another long fishing rod. My cat is flying everywhere! 😄

reviews.name: s****
reviews.content: 마당냥이들 놀아주다 많이 긁혀서 샀어요 좋아요 애들도 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: I bought this for my outdoor cats since I get scratched up a lot playing with them. It's great! The cats love it too.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 이친구가 엄청 좋아합니다! 길이조절 안되는거 빼곤 다좋아요
reviews.content_en: My cat absolutely loves this! Everything is great except for the fact that you can't adjust the length.

reviews.name: e****
reviews.content:
히끄 보고샀는데
9살 울냥님은 별로 안좋아 하시네요
까탈냥
reviews.content_en: I saw it on Tiktok and bought it, but my 9-year-old cat doesn't really like it. She's so picky!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
어 뭐지 이거 진짜 낚시대인데..?
아직 고양이가 없어요
reviews.content_en: Wait, is this actually a real fishing rod...? I don't have a cat yet though.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 개봉하자마자 코킁킁거리고 무릎쫓아 올라오고 좋아하네요
reviews.content_en: Right when I opened the box, my cat started sniffing around, jumped on my lap, and loves it!
